reason: Verified that the SuperAgent browser use feature can successfully open a browser, navigate to a specified URL, retrieve page information, and display live browser preview in the UI.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Successfully loaded the SuperAgent dashboard showing the agents list in the sidebar and main content area.
Located and clicked on "QA-20260505-225831-x8lf" agent in the sidebar — Successfully opened the agent chat interface, displayed the message input box, and showed the agent configuration panels.
Typed and sent message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully entered into the input field and sent by clicking the Send button.

Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent completed the task in 7 seconds, displaying two successful tool calls: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title" with checkmark indicators.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly displayed "The page title is **Example Domain**" in bold text, confirming the agent successfully navigated to the URL and retrieved the correct page title.
Took final screenshot showing complete UI state — Screenshot captured the full interface including:
